Class News

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.notification.News
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class News extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a news item within the university system. News can be categorized, pinned to the top of the feed, and includes a section for user comments.
See Also:

      public void addComment(String comment)

      comment - The text of the comment to add.
